title: koeleria asiatica subsp. ledebourii
intro: Koeleria asiatica subsp. ledebourii, also known as Leptkoeleria or Ledebour's Koeleria, is a subspecies of perennial grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Koeleria asiatica subsp. ledebourii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
